label: Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans

node.label: Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans
node.definition: A skill library stores reusable procedures, prompts, programs, policies, and workflows that an agent can retrieve and compose for recurring tasks.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans is to connect Procedural memory & skills, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations to downstream capabilities including Autonomous software-engineering agents, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence.
examples: substrate for Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Procedural memory & skills, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.

dependencies.rationale: Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans stores, selects, or obtains information through Procedural memory & skills.
Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans uses Observe–plan–act agent loops as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
